Comunicazion Urgente,"Gentile CLIENTE, Nell'ambito di un progetto di verifica dei data anagrafici forniti durante la sottoscrizione dei servizi di Banca di Roma e stata riscontrata una incongruenza relativa ai dati anagrafici in oggetto da Lei forniti all momento della sottoscrizione contrattuale. L'inserimento dei dati alterati puo costituire motivo di interruzione del servizio secondo gli art. 135 e 137/c da Lei accettati al momento della sottoscrizione, oltre a costituire reato penalmente perseguibile secondo il C.P.P ar.415 del 2001 relativo alla legge contro il riciclaggio e la transparenza dei dati forniti in auto certificazione. Per ovviare al problema e necessaria la verifica e l'aggiornamento dei dati relativi all'anagrafica dell'Intestatario dei servizi bancari. Effetuare l'aggiornamento dei dati cliccando sul seguente collegamento sicuro: -- Cordiali Saluti",1,0

The Sierra is home to three national parks, twenty-six wilderness areas, ten national forests, and two national monuments. These areas include Yosemite, Sequoia, and Kings Canyon National Parks

column1: More than one hundred million years ago during the Nevadan orogeny, granite formed deep underground. The range started to uplift less than five million years ago, and erosion by glaciers exposed the granite and formed the light-colored mountains and cliffs that make up the range. The uplift caused a wide range of elevations and climates in the Sierra Nevada, which are reflected by the presence of five life zones (areas with similar plant and animal communities). Uplift continues due to faulting caused by tectonic forces, creating spectacular fault block escarpments along the eastern edge of the southern Sierra.

The Sierra Nevada has played an important role in the history of California and the United States. The California Gold Rush occurred in the western foothills from 1848 through 1855. Due to its inaccessibility, the range was not fully explore",1,1

column1: Lukka Insights: Lukka’s Role in ETFs, Benchmarks, and Compliance Solutions,"Lukka Newsletter

In this issue of the Lukka newsletter, we present the latest updates from both content and product perspectives, highlighting how Lukka continues to deliver precision and reliability in the digital asset space.

Content : Discover how Lukka’s accurate crypto asset data supports the rise of crypto Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs), offering critical insights into this innovative investment opportunity. Additionally, learn how Lukka’s data solutions are being integrated to enhance analytics and AML compliance across the digital asset industry.
Product : Explore Lukka Crypto Benchmarks, the industry standard for digital asset benchmarking, and learn how it provides reliable solutions for ETFs, derivatives, and AML compliance.
Don’t miss out on these updates—read on to learn more!
Crypto ETFs: How Lukka Ensures Precision in a Complex Market

The investment world witnessed a paradigm shift with the emergence of crypto Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs). Crypto ETFs combine traditional ETF structures with the rapidly evolving crypto market, creating new opportunities for investors.
Explore how Crypto ETFs have risen to prominence and the pivotal role Lukka's real-time, accurate crypto asset data plays in this new investment era.
Lukka Crypto Benchmarks Trusted Solutions for Digital Asset Benchmarking

Lukka Crypto Benchmarks offers the most reliable and flexible digital asset benchmark services, adhering to IOSCO Principles for Financial Benchmarks. Designed to meet the needs of exchange-traded funds (ETFs), derivative contracts, and other financial products, Lukka Benchmarks sets the standard for accuracy and integrity in the rapidly evolving digital asset market.
Lukka Benchmarks offers a comprehensive suite of solutions for digital asset financial products:
Proprietary and Redistributed Data : Tailored to meet diverse use cases with custom data solutions.
Pre-Established and Custom Benchmarks : For enhanced flexibility in tracking market performance.
FMV Data for NAV Post-Trade Reporting : Delivering accurate valuations for financial reporting needs.
Calculation Agent Services : Supporting financial products with robust benchmark calculations.
AML Compliance and Risk Reporting : Ensuring transparency and security for tokenized assets.
Learn more about Lukka Benchmarks and discover how we can support your digital asset benchmarking needs.
Amber Group, a leading global digital asset company, announced a strategic integration of Lukka Insights into Amber Group’s data.
Matter Labs Utilizes Lukka’s Data Solutions
Matter Labs, a contributor to Ethereum-based ZKsync, will use Lukka’s leading blockchain data solution for analytics and AML compliance.

Founded in 2014, Lukka serves the most risk-mature businesses in the world with institutional data and software solutions. As a global company, headquartered in the United States, Lukka bridges the gap between the complexities of blockchain data in a global crypto ecosystem with traditional business and reporting requirements.

All of Lukka’s products are created with institutional standards, such as AICPA Service and Organization Controls (SOC), which focus on data quality, financial calculation accuracy & completeness, and managing technology operational risk. Lukka has obtained AICPA SOC 1 Type II and SOC 2 Type II Audits, an ISO/IEC-27001 certification, NIST Cybersecurity Assessment, and continues to lead the industry with best in class technology risk governance.
Our global team looks forward to partnering with you to solve your data challenges.
You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us. You can always unsubscribe from newsletter.
